message:
chore(beads): sync issue ledger after security/robustness pass

Routine `br sync --flush-only` export of `.beads/issues.jsonl`. Status
metadata only — no schema or dependency-graph changes.

Reflects closure of beads opened during the security pass landed in
the preceding commits (allowlist boundary checks, ANSI stripper
state machine, hot-path panic bounds, AST worker cancellation,
hermetic test environment, suggest-allowlist `--accept-risk` gate)
plus updated `updated_at` / `closed_at` timestamps on a handful of
visual-regression and graduated-response beads that those commits
finished off in the same session.

`.beads/.write.lock` is intentionally NOT staged — it is the
per-process `flock` coordination file and is regenerated on the next
`br` invocation.
